item.title: FZF for the win!
item.author: Author
item.description: If you spend time in the terminal, then you probably will like fzf.

item.title: psystem
item.author: Author
item.description: Let's develop a simple particle system in python, from scratch.

item.title: Naming
item.author: Author
item.description: Join me on this video series coding a naming convention manager step by step, 10 minutes at a time.

item.title: dgpy
item.author: Author
item.description: A naive dependency graph implemented in python, coded live in a test-driven development fashion.

item.title: Yet another 'dorito' tutorial

item.description: A rigging tutorial on a 'dorito' setup for Autodesk Maya.
